description_long: This object is a digital drawing tablet with a large, rectangular display screen occupying most of its front surface. The screen is bordered by a slim, black bezel and displays a 3D modeling software interface, suggesting it is used for creative or professional digital work. The back of the tablet is a bold red color and features a built-in stand that props the device at an ergonomic angle for drawing or viewing. Accompanying the tablet is a stylus pen with a matching red accent, which rests in a small, black stand. The overall design is sleek and modern, with clean lines and a professional appearance. The materials appear to be primarily plastic and glass, with some metal components likely used for structural support.
description: A sleek digital drawing tablet with a large screen, red back, and matching stylus pen on a stand. The device is modern, with a slim black bezel and ergonomic stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display screen with a black bezel and the digital art interface visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile, angled red stand, and the upright stylus pen in its holder.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid red back panel and the full width of the integrated stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the angled stand and the stylus pen from a different perspective.
attribute_screen_presence: Yes, a large rectangular screen dominates the front, occupying nearly the entire surface except for a slim bezel.
attribute_bezel_design: The bezel is slim, black, and symmetrical on all sides, with slightly rounded corners and a smooth finish.
